napi build -o=./src --release --manifest-path ../../crates/rolldown_binding/Cargo.toml --platform -p rolldown_binding --js binding.js --dts binding.d.ts --dts-header "type MaybePromise<T> = T | Promise<T>
type Nullable<T> = T | null | undefined
type VoidNullable<T = void> = T | null | undefined | void"
